missions.title: Mr. Worldwide
missions.task: This one is easy, but don't get used to it ;) Mr. Worldwide is not far away, pick it up and let it burn. Everyone needs to drink a shot. If someone is a non-drinker you can select a member on your team to drink, but you won't be able to drink alcohol for the entirety of the party. Upload a selfie of all team members' faces after the shot. The one that makes the biggest face has to drink another shot.
missions.next_hint: In the jungle the mighty jungle you shall climb the steepest mountain, have your eyes open at all times and make sure you do not miss the next clue (the entire fellowship must ascend together).

missions.title: Lion King Jungle Climb
missions.location: Go to the steepest mountain and don't blink, as you might miss the next clue.
missions.task: In the jungle the mighty jungle you shall climb the steepest mountain, have your eyes open at all times and make sure you do not miss the next clue (the entire fellowship must ascend together). When you find the tool to get you to the top, you shall sing The Lion Sleeps Tonight - record the performance and transmit the video (you shall all sing). Upload the video to continue.
missions.next_hint: It's at a place where you throw something in, don't go outside the park and you can split up to find it faster.

missions.title: Gooooal.., or whatever they say...
missions.location: The Basket of Fates. Many decoys - you must choose the right one
missions.task: You shall throw the "basketball" into the hoop, take turns until someone scores, the entire process needs to be recorded and uploaded
missions.next_hint: The path ahead lies distant; maintain your stride and seek the largest microphone in Roskilde

missions.title: Gigaphone
missions.location: Opposite of Gigaphone (largest one in Roskilde)
missions.task: Find the giant microphone. As a full team, create and perform a short, high-energy birthday rap song for Klaudusia. The lyrics must be original, include the words 'hunt', 'team', 'cake', 'adventure', and at least one hilarious line roasting a teammate or the birthday girl. Sing it loud with attitude and group harmonies. Record the entire performance on video as proof – the giant mic must be clearly visible in the background.
missions.next_hint: Not far from here or perhaps very far indeed stands a wall full of murals. Each of you shall seek your favored one and render it upon parchment - the fellowship shall vote upon the finest, and you shall transmit the likeness of your rendering beside the mural.

missions.title: Mural
missions.location: Many Faces, Many shades waiting in 1 place.
missions.task: Not far from here or perhaps very far indeed stands a wall full of murals. Each of you pick your favorite one and draw it on paper. Once everyone’s finished, vote as a team on the best drawing, then take a photo of it placed right next to the actual mural on the wall. Upload that photo as proof.
missions.next_hint: Ever wanted to become a DJ? Now is your chance record a cool track and upload it the qr code is under the set

missions.title: Become a DJ
missions.location: The DJ set - inspect it to find the next QR
missions.task: Ever wanted to become a DJ? Now is your chance record a cool track and upload it. Extra points for beatboxing. Full team effort. Record the masterpiece
missions.next_hint: After the beats drop, head straight to the skate park for some real parkour. Perform a run across the obstacles and leave your ass marks on the surfaces as part of it. Record the full parkour sequence and the marks. The whole team must take part.

missions.title: 2v2 Tag Parkour
missions.location: Indoor hall next to the outdoor skate park, Office S6 Ep.1
missions.task: Find the indoor space right next to the outdoor skatepark. Split into two teams of 2 and play a fast game of tag using parkour moves (jumps, rolls, climbing over safe obstacles). The person who is 'it' tags by touch. Film the entire game (at least 2 minutes of non-stop action). Make it funny by adding silly rules like 'must do a victory dance after tagging someone'. The whole team must participate and be in the video as proof.
missions.next_hint: From the skate area, head to the smallest lake right next to it. Look for the smallest reflection of the sky near the spinning wheels and the beats.

missions.title: Smallest Lake Mirror Tag
missions.location: The smallest lake next to the skate park
missions.task: Go to the smallest lake right next to the skate area. Find the spot with the smallest reflection of the sky near the spinning wheels and the beats. Split into pairs and play 'Mirror Tag': one person does a silly move or pose, their partner must perfectly mirror it in the reflection to 'tag' them back. Do at least 3 rounds with increasingly ridiculous mirrored actions (add sounds, faces, or dances). Film the entire thing with the lake and reflections clearly visible as proof. The whole team participates.
missions.next_hint: Now head to the building with the most staircases in Roskilde. One of the tallest - try different routes, count every step, and don't take the elevator.

missions.title: Staircase Marathon
missions.location: The building with the most staircases in Roskilde - Stair nr 67 is special
missions.task: Go to the building with the most staircases in Roskilde. Do not use the elevator at all - only the stairs. Try different routes if you can and count every single step you take going up. Reach a high point, then come back down counting again. Record the entire journey and clearly announce the total step count on video as proof.
missions.next_hint: At the final spot, using only found things, build a birthday gift for Klaudusia. Photo of the team with the creation.

missions.title: Final Birthday Hunt
missions.task: You shall find something that is light and floats, Take an appropriate tool from the bag and POP IT
missions.next_hint: That's all Folks & Klaudusia Enjoy the Gift <3
